hooks.command:
node -e "const p=JSON.parse(process.env.CLAUDE_HOOK_CONTEXT||'{}'); const f=p.tool_input?.file_path||''; if(f.endsWith('/claims.json')){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Direct writes to claims.json are not allowed. Use wheat MCP tools instead:
  - wheat_add-claim: add a new claim
  - wheat_resolve: update or resolve an existing claim
  - wheat_compile: recompile sprint state
File blocked: '+f+'
');process.exit(1)} if(f.endsWith('/compilation.json')){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Direct writes to compilation.json are not allowed. This file is auto-generated.
Run wheat_compile to regenerate it.
File blocked: '+f+'
');process.exit(1)}"
